---
title: "Séminaire Quantact en mathématiques actuarielles et financières" 
subtitle: |
  | A non-parametric estimator for Archimedean copulas under flexible censoring scenarios and an application to claims reserving
  | Marie Michaelides, UQAM 
date: 2024-02-09
toc: TRUE
image: ../../img/PlainQuantact.png
---
  
   
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}
UNIVERSITÉ LAVAL  
Pavillon Adrien-Pouliot, local PLT-2750  
Lien zoom : https://ulaval.zoom.us/j/69121043172?pwd=MjlubWlvSFNsYmoreHY0NkF5QkF2dz09  
ID de réunion : 691 2104 3172  
Code secret : 796106

:::


::: {.column width="2%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](../../img/MMQuantact.png)
:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::::
